findings.message: Vague quantifier 'appropriate' in 'Choose the most appropriate visualization' — no criteria given for what makes a visualization appropriate.
Vague quantifier 'balanced' in 'balanced between simplicity and information' — subjective trade-off with no measurable boundary.
Vague quantifier 'sensible' in 'Use sensible defaults for unspecified options' — does not define what sensible means in context.
Vague quantifier 'appropriate' in 'Use appropriate arrow styles' — no criteria for selecting arrow style.
Vague quantifier 'subtle' in 'Use subtle background colors' — no color value or opacity range specified.
Vague quantifier 'strategic' in 'Strategic colors: Use colors to encode meaning' — 'strategic' adds no precision.
Example blocks in the Examples section show only process steps, not actual JSON Canvas output. A reader cannot verify output format compliance without loading the deferred reference doc.
